data.title: North Korea targets crypto workers with new info-stealing malware
data.description:
North Korean threat actors have been deploying malware through fake crypto job sites, targeting blockchain professionals to steal wallet credentials, Cisco Talos says.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/north-korea-targets-crypto-job-seekers-to-plant-password-jacking-malware?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Major Crypto Exchanges to Accept BlackRock’s BUIDL Fund as Collateral
data.description:
Major crypto exchanges have started to accept BlackRock’s tokenized market fund for collateral.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/major-crypto-exchanges-to-accept-blackrocks-buidl-fund-as-collateral/

data.title: Meteora: New profit and loss tracker and DLMM fund pool tool to be launched
data.description: Solana ecosystem liquidity protocol Meteora released a summary of the community call meeting, including: 1. A new profit and loss tracker will be launched soon, which supports the display of USDC value, and the web version is under development; 2. A community tool for the DLMM funding pool will be developed to support tracking the decline in position liquidity and send notifications on Telegram; 3. A Dune dashboard will be created for DLMM and DBC.

data.title: Trader 0xb8b9's winning streak may be ended, and the current position loss exceeds 2 million US dollars
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that the on-chain address 0xb8b9 has won 29 consecutive long transactions, with a cumulative profit of more than 2.3 million US dollars. It has recently bet on BTC, ETH, SOL and LINK, but the current floating loss of its holdings has exceeded 2 million US dollars.

data.title: JD.com Stock Declines Amid Stablecoin Licensing Ambitions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, JD.com's Hong Kong shares experienced a decline for the third consecutive day, with a current drop of 0.56%, bringing the stock price to 124 HKD.

Recently, JD Group's Chairman Liu Qiangdong expressed the company's intention to apply for stablecoin licenses in all major currency countries worldwide.

data.title: Bitcoin trades near $105K amid low volatility; analysts offer mixed outlooks
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) trades around $104. 5K, down 2% weekly, amid market uncertainty and Mideast tension fears. CryptoQuant warns BTC could revisit $92K or $81K if demand keeps falling. Glassnode sees “quiet” blockchain as network maturation, with institutions driving large-value transfers
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-trades-near-105k-amid-low-volatility-analysts-offer-mixed-outlooks/

data.title: BounceBit launches high leverage contract platform BounceBit Trade
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BounceBit announced the official launch of its new contract trading platform BounceBit Trade, which supports 50x leverage.

data.title: Blockchain Address Achieves Consecutive Wins in Trading
data.description: According to PANews, monitoring by Lookonchain reveals that the blockchain address 0xb8b9 has achieved 29 consecutive successful long trades, amassing over $2.3 million in profits. Recently, the address has placed bets on Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), and Chainlink (LINK). However, the current holdings are experiencing an unrealized loss exceeding $2 million.

data.title: Bitcoiners split on $94K or $114K for BTC’s next move as it trades sideways
data.description:
A recent poll on X shows that half of the respondents bet that Bitcoin would rise to $114,000, while the other half expect it to fall well below $100,000.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-predictions-new-highs-100k-retrace-crypto-analyst-poll?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Alpha's trading volume rebounded slightly to $698 million yesterday, with AB, BR, and KOGE ranking in the top three
data.description: According to the data panel produced by Panda Jackson on Dune, Binance Alpha's trading volume rebounded slightly on June 19, reporting $698 million, and the trading volume was $691 million on June 18. Among them, AB's trading volume was $339 million, BR's trading volume was $183 million, and KOGE's trading volume was $44.1 million, ranking first.

source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/06/20/cryptos-yet-to-cement-store-of-value-status/

data.title: The crypto sector stabilized slightly, while BTC and ETH fluctuated within a narrow range
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the US stock market was closed and the situation in the Middle East was tense, the market wait-and-see sentiment heated up, and the crypto market stabilized and rebounded slightly. Among them, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 0.24% in 24 hours, fluctuating in a narrow range around $104,000. Ethereum (ETH) rose 0.64%, maintaining above $2,500. In addition, the PayFi sector rose 0.54%, eCash (XEC) and Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rose 5.46% and 8.58% respectively.
Other bright spots include: Layer1 sector rose 0.42% in 24 hours, TRON (TRX) and Solana (SOL) rose 0.73% and 0.96% respectively; RWA sector rose 0.34%, Pendle (PENDLE) and Plume (PLUME) rose 3.94% and 6.63% respectively; CeFi sector rose 0.18%, Gate (GT) and OKB rose 7.39% and 10.63% respectively.
In addition, the DeFi sector fell 0.17% in 24 hours, but Uniswap (UNI) rose 3.73%; the Layer2 sector fell 0.20%, and Mantle (MNT) rose again by 3.32%; the Meme sector fell 0.42%, and the AI ​​sector fell 1.64%, but Fetch.ai (FET) rose 2.09% in 24 hours due to factors such as the Fetch Foundation's announcement of a $50 million FET token repurchase.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, shows that the ssiPayFi, ssiLayer1, and ssiMAG7 indexes rose 0.73%, 0.51%, and 0.42% in 24 hours, respectively.

data.title: Bitwise CEO: “Regulatory uncertainty” is no longer the biggest obstacle for Bitcoin investors
data.description: Hunter Horsley, CEO of Bitwise, said in a post on the X platform that in the past, "regulatory uncertainty" was the biggest obstacle for Bitcoin investors. In 2025, the situation is completely different. This is a huge change, but the impact on the market has not yet fully emerged. In addition, there are two problems with Bitcoin investment at present: first, most investors and asset allocators are very busy and have no time to pay attention to Bitcoin due to too many opportunities (including other assets that may rise 10 times); second, gold is indeed one of the least popular investments in the United States. Some family offices do not invest in gold, so they do not pay attention to Bitcoin, which is called "digital gold."

data.title: Tether CEO: Open Source Password Manager PearPass to be Launched Soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Paolo Ardoino, CEO of stablecoin issuer Tether, posted on the X platform that 16 billion login credentials of online service providers such as Apple, Google, and Facebook were leaked, and cloud services once again disappointed the market. It is time to abandon the cloud, which is why Tether built PearPass. PearPass is about to be launched. It is a fully localized open source password manager that does not require cloud services or servers. It only manages keys independently and supports secure storage on devices.

data.title: Tether CEO Criticizes Cloud Services Amid Data Breach
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino has expressed concerns over a significant data breach involving 16 billion login credentials from major online service providers like Apple, Google, and Facebook. Ardoino criticized cloud services for their repeated failures, suggesting it is time to abandon them. He highlighted this issue as a driving factor behind Tether's development of PearPass, an upcoming open-source password manager. PearPass is designed to operate entirely locally, eliminating the need for cloud services or servers, and allowing users to manage their keys independently while securely storing them on their devices.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Convene National Security Meeting
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to hold a national security meeting on Friday at 11 a.m. Eastern Time (11 p.m. UTC+8).

data.title: TRX Surpasses DOGE in Cryptocurrency Market Capitalization
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from CoinMarketCap indicates that TRX has overtaken DOGE in terms of market capitalization. TRX's market value is approximately $26.05 billion, while DOGE's stands at around $25.46 billion. This shift places TRX in the eighth position in the cryptocurrency rankings.
